questions.question: Describe the main difference between Round Robin (RR) scheduling and Priority Scheduling. (3 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the time slicing discipline and the role of priority in each

questions.question: A system has three processes P1, P2 and P3. The timeshared 8 CPU is allocated as follows: P1 1 CPU cycle, P2 2 CPU cycles, P3 3 CPU cycles. Then P1 is given time sliced 1 CPU cycle. (4 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the time sliced allocation and how it affects the processes

questions.question: State the advantages and disadvantages of the First-Come-First-Served (FCFS) scheduling algorithm. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Compare the characteristics of FCFS algorithm with other non-preemptive algorithms
